case_title: LARRY P ZOGLIN VS. UNITED AIRLINES, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC.
